Prefer to browse yourself?

Hotels on Booking.com Airbnb in Kent

October weekends in Kent fill up quickly, so we recommend booking early.

How to Get Here

Getting There

Three ways to join us in Gravesend

From the Airport

Heathrow and Gatwick are the nearest major airports. From central London, Gravesend is approximately 30 minutes by train from London Bridge or St Pancras.

By Train

Regular train services run from London Bridge and London Cannon Street to Gravesend. Journey time is around 30–35 minutes.

By Car / Taxi

Gravesend is accessible via the A2/M2. Ubers and local taxis are available. Pre-booking your return journey after the reception is strongly recommended.
